title: Pilgrimage and Governors
description: In this year, Khalid b. 'Abdallah gave charge of the worship at alBasrah together with the security force, youths (ahdath),264 and judiciary to Bilal b. Abi Burdah, bringing all these together under him and thereby dismissing Thumamah b. 'Abdallah b. Anas from the judiciary. In this year, Ibrahim b. Hisham b. Ismail led the pilgrimage, as reported by Abu Ma'shar, al-Wagidi and others. I heard this from Ahmad b. Thabit-his informant Ishaq b. Isa-Abu Ma'shar.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 25
